## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what should the project do that it does not do today? -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve or what does it demonstrate? -->

## Proposed approach

<!-- Optional: sketch of how you would implement this. A few sentences or pseudocode is fine. -->

## Scope check

- [ ] Works within the existing four-module pipeline (`ticket_generator → database → ai_triage → app`)
- [ ] Does not require replacing SQLite or adding a new database
- [ ] Does not break simulation mode (app must remain functional without an API key)

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider and why did you set them aside? -->
